calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Lila Owens To Perpetuate Testimony Of Allen Brooks By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Nov-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing through CourtCall for Petitioner Lila Owens.
Steven E. Bledsoe of LARSON LLP (213-436-4888), appearing through CourtCall for Specially Appearing defendant World Oil.
Daniel S. Hurwitz of WILSON ELSER MOSKOWITZ EDELMAN & DICKER LLP (213-443-5100), appearing through CourtCall for Specially Appearing defendant Atlantic Richfield Company.
Ashley Rivkin of MANNING, GROSS & MASSENBURG (213) 622-7300, appearing through CourtCall for Specially Appearing defendant Oscar E. Erickson.
Taylor Matsumoto of BERKES CRANE ROBINSON & SEAL LLP (213-955-1150), appearing through CourtCall for Specially Appearing defendant Fluor Corporation.
Emily M. Cunningham of HAWKINS PARNELL & YOUNG (415-766-3200) appearing through CourtCall for Specially Appearing defendant For, Marconi Plastering Co.
Shelly K. Tinkoff of SELMAN BREITMAN LLP (415-979-0400), appearing through CourtCall for Specially Appearing defendant Lamons Gasket Company.
Yuri Chornobil of MANNING, GROSS & MASSENBURG (949-892-4700), appearing through CourtCall for Specially Appearing defendant JM Manufacturing Company, Inc.
Jocelyn M. Soriano of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), appearing through CourtCall for Specially Appearing defendant Riley Power Inc.
Thomas Steig of PRINDLE, GOETZ, BARNES & REINHOLTZ, LLP (415-788-8354), appearing through CourtCall for Specially Appearing defendant Union Oil.

RULING:
Hearing held and tentative ruling amended as follows: The Petition of Lila Owens to Perpetuate Testimony of Allen Brooks by Videotaped Deposition is granted pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 2035.050(a). No opposition filed. Respondents must serve a Notice of Appearance within two (2) court days of receiving an Order on this Petition. The deposition of Allen Brooks must take place by Zoom within thirty (30) days of the Court's Order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Lila Owens To Perpetuate Testimony Of Allen Brooks By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Nov-24-2020 Continued To Nov-25-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: The Petition of Lila Owens to Perpetuate Testimony of Allen Brooks by Videotaped Deposition is continued on the Court's own motion to November 25, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
